eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Roosevelt, NM; at 8:59 AM on MAY 29, 2026 Effective until 6:59 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Unseasonably warm temperatures, critically low humidity, high winds, and drought conditions across the state have increased wildfire danger.

Wildfires can spread rapidly leading to loss of life, destroyed property, and loss of resources.

DO NOT BURN.

Fireworks, campfires, open fires, and open burning have been restricted by New Mexico State Forestry.

Thank you for protecting your community by preventing wildfires. 

CHECK rooseveltcounty.com/2026-fire-restrictions for more details.

Las temperaturas inusualmente calidas, la humedad extremadamente baja, los fuertes vientos y las condiciones de sequia en todo el estado han aumentado el peligro de incendios forestales.

Los incendios forestales pueden propagarse rapidamente y causar perdida de vidas, danos a propiedades y problemas de salud.
NO QUEME.

Los fuegos artificiales, fogatas, fuegos al aire libre y quemas abiertas han sido restringidos por New Mexico State Forestry.

VISITE rooseveltcounty.com/2026-fire-restrictions
